rationale: Live OpenDART list.json responses recorded with the operator's OPENDART_API_KEY (redacted). Per R10 the JSON bodies are byte-equal to the live responses; OpenDART does not echo the crtfc_key parameter inside the JSON body (it lives in the URL query only), so no in-body key redaction was required. URL templates above carry *** in place of the live key.

recent_all.json.note: 1-week mixed-category snapshot. Contains 임원ㆍ주요주주특정증권등소유상황보고서, 주식등의대량보유상황보고서, 주요사항보고서(자기주식처분결정), [기재정정]주요사항보고서(유상증자결정), 등 — all four target categories represented for routing tests.

treasury_stock.json.note: 주요사항보고서(자기주식취득결정), 주요사항보고서(자기주식처분결정), 주요사항보고서(자기주식취득신탁계약체결결정) entries present. Note: pblntf_detail_ty filter is permissive on the live API — response is broader than the literal code.

dividend.json.note: Early March covers the post-결산 dividend declaration period. Contains 현금ㆍ현물배당결정 entries.

capital.json.note: 주요사항보고서 family — 유상증자결정 / 전환사채권발행결정 / 감자결정 entries (capital_change category).

major_holder.json.note: 지분공시 (D type) — 주식등의대량보유상황보고서 / 임원ㆍ주요주주특정증권등소유상황보고서 entries (ownership_change category).

empty.json.note: Far-future date with no disclosures. status=013 / message=조회된 데이타가 없습니다.

invalid_key.json.note: Bad API key — status=010 / message=등록되지 않은 인증키입니다. Adapter must surface this as SourceFetchError(transient=False).
